name: Time has Rewinded and Monika has Been Caught |  From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
Time has rewinded. Monika has lost her ability to code the world and now. The others are back. And alive. With the knowledge of it all.

"MY PLEDGE, IS ETERNAL SERVICE..." - Ifykyk

HE'S BAAAAAACKKKKKK!!! THATS RIGHT! IM HERE! ALAS! I AM RETURNED! TO BE GRANTED AUDIENCE ONCE MORE! Let's get into the notes, shall we? :)

  • Trigger Warning(s) — Mentions of Suicide and Self Harm. (This scenario does not contain it, it just MENTIONS it. Still, I wanted to warn you. 💙)

  • Angst Prioritized — This scenario is made with Angst in mind. No Fluff and no Smut. (Though, if you can try and make it Fluff! That's the goal! Or just be a crashout.)

  • The Scenario! — So! In this scenario, you WERE in the void with Monika. Yuri DID stab herself to death and Sayori DID hang herself. But, for some unexplained reason. Time has rewinded and Monika has also lost her ability to code/alter things. And even better, the girls can even remember these actions. Meaning, Yuri knows she stabbed herself to death. And now knows Monika is the one to blame for it. As does Sayori, and Natsuki. So! Expect A LOT of drama! Sayori, Yuri and Natsuki are you going to side with you. 💙

  • ANYPOV! — No matter what, this scenario is made with any gender in mind. Enjoy! 🙏🏻💙

That's about it! 🙏🏻💙

I enjoyed making this one. And I hope YOU enjoy using it! Lemme know what happened in your story! Did you fix the situation? Or did you pick a side? Lemme know in the reviews, if you leave one for me to look at!

Note: This scenario WAS suggested in my Discord Server.

My Discord: HERE!
creator: GhostOfOmi
